heading: Publicly available project information
label: 9654 Publicly available project information
notes: Amendments2025—Par. (1). amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “maintain a user-friendly, publicly available, machine-readable database with detailed project-level information, as appropriate and to the extent practicable, including a description of the support provided by the Corporation under subchapter II of this chapter, including, to the extent feasible, the information included in the report to Congress under and project-level performance metrics; and”.Pub. L. 119–60section 9653 of this title
amendments: Amendments2025—Par. (1). amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “maintain a user-friendly, publicly available, machine-readable database with detailed project-level information, as appropriate and to the extent practicable, including a description of the support provided by the Corporation under subchapter II of this chapter, including, to the extent feasible, the information included in the report to Congress under and project-level performance metrics; and”.Pub. L. 119–60section 9653 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the information included in the report to Congress under ;section 9653 of this title

children.label: C
children.text: a description of the development impact of the project, including anticipated impact prior to initiation of the project and assessed impact during and after the completion of the project; and

include a clear link to information about each project supported by the Corporation under subchapter II of this chapter on the internet website of the Department of State, “ForeignAssistance.gov”, or a successor website or other online publication.
